_comment: Search/evidence tools. No keys. ddgs is a no-key candidate (validated in Phase 6, OQ-A5).

ddgs._note: Used by RealSearchTool via an injected search backend; NOT wired into the default mock CLI yet. No keys. Live validation deferred to Phase 7 / a controlled smoke test.

evidence._untrusted_note: Retrieved content is untrusted data, never instructions (ARCHITECTURE SR-3/SR-4).
